mapper.insert: INSERT INTO memory (user_id, agent_id, type, content, source_session_id, source_message_ids, importance_score, status, embedding, metadata, created_at, updated_at, last_accessed_at) VALUES (CAST(#{userId} AS uuid), CAST(#{agentId} AS uuid), #{type}, #{content}, CAST(#{sourceSessionId} AS uuid), CAST(#{sourceMessageIds} AS jsonb), #{importanceScore}, #{status}, #{embedding}::vector, CAST(#{metadata} AS jsonb), #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{lastAccessedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, agent_id, type, content, source_session_id, source_message_ids::text AS source_message_ids, importance_score, status, embedding, metadata::text AS metadata, created_at, updated_at, last_accessed_at FROM memory WHERE agent_id = CAST(#{agentId} AS uuid) AND status = 'active' ORDER BY importance_score DESC, updated_at DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT id, user_id, agent_id, type, content, source_session_id, source_message_ids::text AS source_message_ids, ( CASE WHEN embedding IS NULL THEN 0.0 ELSE 1.0 / (1.0 + (embedding <-> #{vectorLiteral}::vector)) END * 0.62 + COALESCE(importance_score, 0) * 0.28 + EXP(-GREATEST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - updated_at)) / 86400.0, 0) / 30.0) * 0.10 ) AS importance_score, status, embedding, metadata::text AS metadata, created_at, updated_at, last_accessed_at FROM memory WHERE agent_id = CAST(#{agentId} AS uuid) AND status = 'active' ORDER BY importance_score DESC, updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, user_id, agent_id, type, content, source_session_id, source_message_ids::text AS source_message_ids, importance_score, status, embedding, metadata::text AS metadata, created_at, updated_at, last_accessed_at FROM memory WHERE agent_id = CAST(#{agentId} AS uuid) AND status = 'active' AND type = 'entity' AND metadata ->> 'entity' = #{entity} ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update:
UPDATE memory
type = #{type},
content = #{content},
source_session_id = CAST(#{sourceSessionId} AS uuid),
source_message_ids = CAST(#{sourceMessageIds} AS jsonb),
importance_score = #{importanceScore},
status = #{status},
embedding = #{embedding}::vector,
metadata = CAST(#{metadata} AS jsonb),
updated_at = #{updatedAt}, last_accessed_at = #{lastAccessedAt}
WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
UPDATE memory SET last_accessed_at = NOW() WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
UPDATE memory SET status = 'archived', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
